Assumption: Author-constructed regional score from 0 to 1; higher means lower relative interconnection friction and easier relative development environment.
Reasoning: Exact state-level queue times are not consistently available across all states. The score proxies regional development friction using ISO/RTO structure, interconnection queue literature, and reported queue congestion.
Sources: Rand et al. 2025; Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory; PJM Interconnection; CAISO; MISO; ERCOT
